title: Bulk Assign Reports and Dashboards to Multiple Metrics
story: As a data analyst, I want to bulk-assign a report or dashboard to multiple selected metrics at once, so that I can save significant time when relating reports to metrics.
description:
When relating a dashboard or report to a metric, the user previously had to repeat the process individually for each metric (approximately 6-7 clicks per metric). This feature adds bulk assignment capability.

### Approach
Similar to the existing bulk edit for Line of Business and Topic, a new tab was added to the bulk edit popup that allows selecting reports or dashboards to assign to all selected metrics at once.

### Future Enhancement
When the magic wand feature analyzes a dashboard, it will also return a list of reports to automatically suggest for metric relationships.
acceptance_criteria: Users can multi-select metrics in the glossary table
Bulk edit popup includes a tab for assigning reports/dashboards
Selected reports/dashboards are assigned to all selected metrics in one action
Bulk assignment saves approximately 6-7 clicks per metric
Existing bulk edit functionality for Line of Business and Topic is unaffected
ux_changes: New tab in the bulk edit popup for assigning reports and dashboards to multiple selected metrics simultaneously.
middleware_changes: Batch assignment endpoint that accepts multiple metric IDs and report/dashboard IDs for bulk relationship creation.
api_changes: Extended the bulk edit API to support report/dashboard assignment alongside existing LOB and Topic assignment.
implementation_notes: Leverages the existing multi-select and bulk edit infrastructure. Future integration with the magic wand feature will enable automated report-to-metric suggestions.
